app.name: Bridge
app.tagline: A multilingual health companion for patients and caregivers.
auth.title: Sign in to your health workspace
auth.body: Track medicines, understand prescriptions, and get safety alerts in your preferred language.
auth.name: Full name
onboarding.title: Choose the language Bridge should use for you
onboarding.body: Your preferred language is saved so results and alerts can be translated for you.
onboarding.chat.subtitle: Tell Bridge about yourself
onboarding.chat.error: Something went wrong. You can skip to finish setup.
onboarding.chat.kickoff: Please start my health profile setup in my selected language.
onboarding.chat.unavailable: The onboarding assistant is unavailable right now. Add your AI key and refresh, or skip to continue.
onboarding.medications.title: Add the medicines you want Bridge to track
onboarding.medications.body: Add each medicine once, choose the time of day you take it, and set how many days it should stay on your schedule.
onboarding.medications.name: Medicine name
settings.title: Edit your health profile
settings.body: Keep your language, health details, and medicine schedule up to date so Bridge stays useful.
settings.profile.title: Review what Bridge knows about you
settings.profile.body: Update the health details collected during onboarding so future analysis stays relevant.
settings.profile.helper: Use commas to separate multiple items.
settings.medicines.title: Edit tracked medicines and schedules
settings.medicines.body: Adjust names, dosage notes, daily times, duration, and whether a medicine stays active on your dashboard.
home.title: Your Bridge dashboard
home.body: Your personal health workspace. Upload prescriptions, check medicine safety, and manage reminders.
